symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: Provide a GU-native field Phi transforming as an observed SU(2)L doublet with hypercharge convention Y(Phi).
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: A source-derived doublet-equivalent carrier and scalar source/operator, not a Standard Model import.

symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: For Phi != 0, construct a normalized dressing U(Phi) and a radial scalar h = ||Phi|| - v from the source vacuum.
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: A GU-derived observed vacuum, branch normalization, and dressing rule fixed before target comparison.

symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: Form dressed weak variables W^d_a from U(Phi); define W+ = (W^d_1 - i W^d_2)/sqrt(2), W- = (W^d_1 + i W^d_2)/sqrt(2).
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: Separate charged W projection/source rows with source replay and stability sidecars.

symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: Keep the dressed neutral basis (W^d_3, B) and require a source weak-angle relation tan(theta_W)=gPrime/g before defining A and Z.
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: A GU weak-angle/coupling lineage and neutral quadratic mass operator, not an observed-mass fit.

symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: Define A = cos(theta_W) B + sin(theta_W) W^d_3 and require an exactly massless source row before W/Z promotion.
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: A massless photon projection row derived from the same neutral mass operator and weak-angle convention.

symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: Define Z = cos(theta_W) W^d_3 - sin(theta_W) B and require the Z row to diagonalize the same source mass operator.
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: A Z projection/source row and common W/Z bridge from source normalization.

symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: Identify the scalar radial excitation h and its quadratic pole from the source potential or Upsilon pairing.
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: A Higgs scalar source/operator, massive profile, and self-coupling/excitation relation fixed without target masses.

symbolicMapRows.algebraicExpression: Extract poles of gauge-invariant two-point functions or an equivalent source spectral operator, then attach GeV/unit normalization.
symbolicMapRows.acceptance: Pole extraction, unit normalization, and application readiness sidecars for Phase201/209/256.

projectionRows.requiredInputs: massless photon eigenstate; weak-angle and neutral mass-matrix lineage
charged source rows; raw W amplitude gate; common W/Z bridge
neutral source row; raw Z amplitude gate; same weak-angle convention as photon
scalar source operator; massive profile; self-coupling or excitation relation

requiredGuInputs.acceptance: Native scalar/doublet-equivalent carrier with observed electroweak representation.
Four-dimensional observed-sector vacuum and nonzero VEV scale from GU.
Dressing field U(Phi) or equivalent gauge-invariant composite map from GU variables.
Observed SU(2)L x U(1)Y embedding and hypercharge convention.
Target-independent g, gPrime, and weak-angle relation with transport to the mass shell.
Gauge-invariant quadratic mass/pole operator around the observed vacuum.
Separate W and Z source rows plus common bridge normalization.
Massless photon projection row from the same neutral operator.
Scalar source/operator, massive profile, and self-coupling/excitation lineage.
Pole extraction, units, stability sidecars, and GeV normalization.

applicationInstructions: Treat every row as a template row until a GU-native source supplies the corresponding field.
Do not apply this template to Phase201 or Phase256 without source-defined carrier, vacuum, embedding, weak-angle, source rows, pole extraction, and unit normalization.
After a source artifact fills the rows, run Phase201/209/210/213/256 and the full boson generator before any target comparison.
